texto: I killed it," Athan lamented. "I am a fool." His righteous anger, his arguments, his adoration for the being who claimed Eldaloth's name faded and disintegrated with all the suffering life behind him. A poisonous dread seeped as deep into his soul as the exultant honor and pride he had felt just minutes before. The vast gap between the two emotions a crater into which his very soul plummeted in free-fall.
explicacao: Citação de Brian K. Fuller sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I killed it," Athan lamented. "I am a fool."
